message:
test: pin fstatat + statx conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_statx_fstatat.rs covering 2 functions:
- fstatat: known file (all 9 stat fields), ENOENT edge, symlink with
  AT_SYMLINK_NOFOLLOW (verifies IFLNK mode)
- statx: STATX_BASIC_STATS mask, 8 fields cross-checked

5 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-stx1
